languages.text: Вся поверхность планеты — безжизненный серый камень, но атмосфера пригодна к дыханию без скафандра. В некоторых глубоких туннелях обнаружены меловые отложения странной формы.
The entire surface of the planet is lifeless grey rock, but the atmosphere is breathable without a voidsuit. In some deep tunnels, strangely shaped chalky sediments have been found.
languages.original_text: Вся поверхность планеты — безжизненный серый камень, но атмосфера пригодна к дыханию без скафандра. В некоторых глубоких туннелях обнаружены меловые отложения странной формы.

traits.locale_text: The entire surface of the planet is lifeless grey rock, but the atmosphere is breathable without a voidsuit. In some deep tunnels, strangely shaped chalky sediments have been found.
The entire surface of the planet is lifeless grey rock, but the atmosphere is breathable without a voidsuit. In some deep tunnels, strangely shaped chalky sediments have been found.
The entire surface of the planet is lifeless grey rock, but the atmosphere is breathable without a voidsuit. In some deep tunnels, strangely shaped chalky sediments have been found.

languages.text: この惑星の表面は、生命のない灰色岩で覆われている。しかし、大気は真空服なしで呼吸できる。深いトンネルの中には、奇妙な形をした石灰質の堆積物が発見されている。
languages.original_text: The entire surface of the planet is lifeless grey rock, but the atmosphere is breathable without a voidsuit. In some deep tunnels, strangely shaped chalky sediments have been found.

traits.locale_text: この惑星の表面は、生命のない灰色岩で覆われている。しかし、大気は真空服なしで呼吸できる。深いトンネルの中には、奇妙な形をした石灰質の堆積物が発見されている。

languages.text: La superficie del planeta entero es de roca gris inerte, pero la atmósfera es respirable sin traje de vacío. En los túneles más profundos, hay sedimentos calcáreos de forma extraña.
languages.original_text: The entire surface of the planet is lifeless grey rock, but the atmosphere is breathable without a voidsuit. In some deep tunnels, strangely shaped chalky sediments have been found.

traits.locale_text: La superficie del planeta entero es de roca gris inerte, pero la atmósfera es respirable sin traje de vacío. En los túneles más profundos, hay sedimentos calcáreos de forma extraña.

languages.text: 行星表面尽是死寂的灰岩，但大气可直接呼吸，无须装备虚空服。在某些深邃的隧道中，发现了形状奇特的白垩质沉积物。
languages.original_text: The entire surface of the planet is lifeless grey rock, but the atmosphere is breathable without a voidsuit. In some deep tunnels, strangely shaped chalky sediments have been found.

traits.locale_text: 行星表面尽是死寂的灰岩，但大气可直接呼吸，无须装备虚空服。在某些深邃的隧道中，发现了形状奇特的白垩质沉积物。

languages.text: Die gesamte Oberfläche des Planeten besteht aus leblosem grauem Fels, aber die Atmosphäre ist ohne Raumanzug atembar. In einigen tiefen Stollen wurden seltsam geformte kreidehaltige Segmente gefunden.
languages.original_text: The entire surface of the planet is lifeless grey rock, but the atmosphere is breathable without a voidsuit. In some deep tunnels, strangely shaped chalky sediments have been found.

traits.locale_text: Die gesamte Oberfläche des Planeten besteht aus leblosem grauem Fels, aber die Atmosphäre ist ohne Raumanzug atembar. In einigen tiefen Stollen wurden seltsam geformte kreidehaltige Segmente gefunden.

languages.text: Gezegenin tüm yüzeyi cansız gri kayadan ibaret ancak atmosfer, boşluk giysisi olmadan solumaya müsait. Bazı derin tünellerde tuhaf şekilli kireçli tortular bulunuyor.
languages.original_text: The entire surface of the planet is lifeless grey rock, but the atmosphere is breathable without a voidsuit. In some deep tunnels, strangely shaped chalky sediments have been found.

traits.locale_text: Gezegenin tüm yüzeyi cansız gri kayadan ibaret ancak atmosfer, boşluk giysisi olmadan solumaya müsait. Bazı derin tünellerde tuhaf şekilli kireçli tortular bulunuyor.

languages.text: Même si la planète est recouverte de roche grise inhospitalière, l'atmosphère reste respirable sans combinaison. Des sédiments calcaires aux formes étranges ont été découverts dans les profondeurs de certains tunnels.
languages.original_text: The entire surface of the planet is lifeless grey rock, but the atmosphere is breathable without a voidsuit. In some deep tunnels, strangely shaped chalky sediments have been found.

traits.locale_text: Même si la planète est recouverte de roche grise inhospitalière, l'atmosphère reste respirable sans combinaison. Des sédiments calcaires aux formes étranges ont été découverts dans les profondeurs de certains tunnels.
